findings.evidence: `rg` shows `mem_sup_adjoin_sq` at lines 108-112 and `mem_sup_adjoin_sq_iff` at lines 116-120 have identical conclusions; roadmap `Multiquadratic/README.md` lines 21 and 90 names only `mem_sup_adjoin_sq` as part of the migrated engine.
findings.fix: Keep the roadmap/public name `mem_sup_adjoin_sq` as the iff lemma and remove `mem_sup_adjoin_sq_iff`, or make one theorem private if it is only an internal compatibility alias.
findings.issue: `mem_sup_adjoin_sq_iff` publicly duplicates `mem_sup_adjoin_sq` with the same statement, bloating the characteristic API for the quadratic normal form.

summary: The finite-index descent wrappers now match the roadmap target shape, but the quadratic normal-form API still exposes a redundant duplicate membership theorem. Keep one public characteristic lemma for this iff form and remove the alias before downstream code depends on both names.
